narrative:
Sugarcreek 150 (precinct in Greene County) has 1,285 registered voters, with 64.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a clear Republican lean of 8.3 percentage points.
